name: 15q11_q13_HERC2_paralog_family
description: HERC2/HERC2P paralog family at 15q11-q13 forms the SD backbone of all four 15q11-q13 breakpoints (BP1, BP2, BP3, and downstream BP4/BP5 at 15q13.3). HERC2P pseudogenes (HERC2P2, HERC2P3, HERC2P7, HERC2P9, HERC2P10) recur at >99% identity within the BPs and on chr16p11.2, contributing to inter-locus NAHR. Functional HERC2 sits between BP3 and the imprinted core.

architecture.internal_structure: HERC2P2-HERC2P3-HERC2P7-HERC2P9-HERC2P10 plus functional HERC2 form a fan of >99% identical 100-300 kb duplicons across BP1-BP3; smaller HERC2P modules also reside in BP4-BP5 (CHRNA7 region).
